NVDA.primary_rationale: Contrarian and bearish consensus, combined with contrarian blind spot on inventory cycles, outweighs bullish momentum.
NVDA.key_tensions: Bullish acceleration vs. bearish distribution; resolved by prioritizing contrarian insight that demand may lag CapEx commitments.
NVDA.kill_trigger_1: NVDA closes below its 50-day moving average for 3 consecutive trading days.
NVDA.kill_trigger_2: NVDA announces that its current data center GPU utilization has fallen below 40% of the committed capacity for the latest quarter.
NVDA.kill_trigger_3: VIX climbs above 25, indicating a high‑volatility regime.

AVGO.primary_rationale: Bearish and contrarian consensus on legacy revenue erosion outweighs bullish custom silicon upside.
AVGO.key_tensions: Bullish custom‑silicon narrative vs. bearish view of legacy segment contraction; resolved by emphasizing contrarian concern about delayed earnings impact.
AVGO.kill_trigger_1: AVGO closes below $380 with volume exceeding 35 million shares on the same day.
AVGO.kill_trigger_2: AVGO discloses that custom silicon revenue accounts for less than 20% of total revenue in the latest quarter.
AVGO.kill_trigger_3: VIX climbs above 25, indicating a high‑volatility regime.

LITE.primary_rationale: Majority bearish and contrarian view that optical interconnect demand is decoupled from AI growth.
LITE.key_tensions: Bullish photonics transition vs. bearish liquidity vacuum; resolved by weighing contrarian blind spot on discrete‑to‑integrated I/O shift.
LITE.kill_trigger_1: LITE closes below $725 with daily volume greater than 1.5 times its 30‑day average.
LITE.kill_trigger_2: LITE announces quarterly optical module orders below $50 million.
LITE.kill_trigger_3: VIX climbs above 25, indicating a high‑volatility regime.

TSM.primary_rationale: Pragmatist base rate and contrarian neutrality outweigh bearish and bullish extremes, maintaining a cautious stance.
TSM.key_tensions: Bullish bottleneck thesis vs. bearish capacity concerns; resolved by giving weight to contrarian view that fixed‑price contracts may erode margins.
TSM.kill_trigger_1: TSMC falls below its 50-day moving average of $421.86 on a session with volume above 1.5x the 30‑day average.
TSM.kill_trigger_2: TSMC reports CoWoS capacity utilization has fallen below 70% for two consecutive quarters.
TSM.kill_trigger_3: VIX climbs above 25, indicating a high‑volatility regime.

QQQ.primary_rationale: Contrarian concentration blind spot and bearish consensus outweigh bullish sector rotation thesis.
QQQ.key_tensions: Bullish software‑platform upside vs. contrarian index concentration; resolved by prioritizing contrarian insight that mega‑cap dominance undermines diversification.
QQQ.kill_trigger_1: QQQ closes below its 10‑day low of $706.52 on a day with trading volume exceeding 45 million shares.
QQQ.kill_trigger_2: QQQ reports that its top five holdings now comprise less than 30% of the index by market cap.
QQQ.kill_trigger_3: VIX climbs above 25, indicating a high‑volatility regime.

SMH.primary_rationale: Bearish and black swan consensus on concentration risk outweighs bullish momentum.
SMH.key_tensions: Bullish hardware upside vs. bearish concentration and geopolitical exposure; resolved by emphasizing contrarian view that ETF mechanics amplify beta.
SMH.kill_trigger_1: SMH closes below its 10‑day low of $581.45 on a session with volume above 1.2x the 30‑day average.
SMH.kill_trigger_2: SMH discloses that its top holdings NVDA and TSM together account for less than 30% of the ETF’s total holdings.
SMH.kill_trigger_3: VIX climbs above 25, indicating a high‑volatility regime.

G3B.SI.primary_rationale: Contrarian and bearish consensus on banking pivot to AI financing outweighs bullish dividend stability thesis.
G3B.SI.key_tensions: Bullish stable‑yield narrative vs. contrarian view of capital reallocation; resolved by prioritizing contrarian blind spot that erodes dividend sustainability.
G3B.SI.kill_trigger_1: G3B.SI closes below its 50-day moving average of $5.24 on a day with volume exceeding 600,000 shares.
G3B.SI.kill_trigger_2: G3B.SI discloses that its dividend payout ratio has dropped below 30% of net income in the latest quarter.
G3B.SI.kill_trigger_3: VIX climbs above 25, indicating a high‑volatility regime.

portfolio_summary: The session sees a systematic reduction across thematic growth and frontier bets (NVDA, AVGO, LITE, SMH, G3B.SI) driven by bearish consensus and contrarian blind spots. TSM is held neutrally to monitor capacity dynamics, while QQQ is also reduced due to index concentration concerns. Overall posture shifts toward defensive core stability with a cautious stance on semiconductor exposure.
